name: PAX East 2027
description: PAX East is a celebration of gaming and gaming culture featuring thought-provoking panels, a massive expo hall filled with the best publishers and studios, new game demos, musical performances, tournaments, and a community experience unlike any other. No matter your preferred genre or platform, if you love games, welcome home.
short_description: A celebration of gaming and gaming culture — panels, expo hall, new game demos, musical performances, and tournaments.
